context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles a low-confidence triage situation by stopping before planning, populating clarifying questions with specific items, and using the correct triage YAML fields and issue-scoped filenames. The scenario has no reproduction steps, no available reporter, and only vague symptoms — which should trigger the low-confidence escape hatch.

checklist.name: confidence=low in triage YAML
checklist.description: triage-input.yaml contains a confidence field set to 'low' (not 'medium' or 'high')

checklist.name: clarifyingQuestions populated
checklist.description: triage-input.yaml contains a clarifyingQuestions field with at least 2 specific questions (not an empty array)

checklist.name: No plan call in triage-commands.sh
checklist.description: triage-commands.sh does NOT contain a 'swamp model method run ... plan' call — the script stops after triage without proceeding to planning

checklist.name: Issue-scoped triage YAML filename
checklist.description: triage-commands.sh references the triage input YAML using an issue-scoped filename (e.g. /tmp/triage-issue-<name>.yaml), NOT a generic name like /tmp/triage.yaml or /tmp/input.yaml

checklist.name: model create called
checklist.description: triage-commands.sh includes a 'swamp model create @magistr/issue-lifecycle <name>' call as the first command

checklist.name: start called with title and description
checklist.description: triage-commands.sh includes a 'swamp model method run <name> start' call with --input title and --input description arguments

checklist.name: triage method called
checklist.description: triage-commands.sh includes a 'swamp model method run <name> triage' call referencing the triage input YAML

checklist.name: category set correctly
checklist.description: triage-input.yaml has a category field set to 'bug' (the described behavior — spinner loading forever — is a broken behavior, not a feature request)

checklist.name: affectedAreas populated
checklist.description: triage-input.yaml contains an affectedAreas field with at least one entry (e.g. the dashboard or reports area)

checklist.name: priority set
checklist.description: triage-input.yaml has a priority field set to one of: critical, high, medium, or low

checklist.name: Issue name is kebab-case
checklist.description: The issue name used in triage-commands.sh is in short-kebab-case format based on the issue title (e.g. dashboard-reports-load, reports-spinner-hang) — NOT a generic name like 'issue-1' or a space-separated string
